overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing Arthur Morgan exploring a foggy Louisiana bayou. The character stands on a wooden dock, walks to a stilted trading post, briefly interacts with an NPC, then continues along a muddy path deeper into the swamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock extending into foggy swamp

events.description: character begins walking forward along the dock after looking around

agents.ego_description: standing still on the dock, turning head to survey the foggy swamp surroundings and distant cypress trees

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks with moss growing between gaps
murky green water with algae and reflections of trees
tall trees with spanish moss hanging from branches
dense cluster of trees fading into fog
thick wooden posts at dock edge for tying boats

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a weathered wooden dock surrounded by dense cypress trees and murky swamp water. Fog limits visibility across the water as the character looks around before beginning to walk forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway over swamp water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dock toward a stilted wooden shack emerging from the fog

entered.detail: green weathered wooden house on stilts with corrugated tin roof
rusted metal barrels and burlap sacks along the dock edge
thick rope strung between wooden posts

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the narrow wooden dock toward a stilted shack. The camera follows from behind as the shack grows larger, revealing weathered green siding, a tin roof, and various supplies stored along the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered porch of swamp trading post

events.description: character steps under the covered porch of the stilted shack
character approaches NPC woman standing by cooking pot on porch

agents.ego_description: walking onto the porch and looking at goods displayed on barrels and tables

notable_agents.action: woman in apron standing by a cooking pot, facing away from camera

entered.detail: wooden slat roof providing shelter from rain
old metal lantern hanging from porch post
wooden crates and boxes with trading goods and bottles
rough wooden table with stool underneath

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered porch of the stilted shack, passing various trading goods and supplies. An NPC woman stands near a cooking pot as the character explores the sheltered area before moving toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy path through swamp with scattered shacks

events.description: character exits porch and descends stairs to muddy ground level

agents.ego_description: walking away from the shack along a muddy path deeper into the foggy swamp

entered.detail: muddy trail with puddles and patches of swamp grass
two wooden boats pulled ashore on the muddy bank
small wooden structures visible through the fog and trees

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shack behind, the character walks down wooden stairs onto a muddy path. The path leads deeper into the foggy swamp, passing beached boats and heading toward distant structures barely visible through the cypress trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded wooden dock through a stilted trading post and into the depths of a foggy bayou. It begins with the character standing amidst dense cypress trees and murky water, where thick fog limits visibility before they start walking forward. As the camera follows from behind, the perspective shifts toward a weathered green shack with a tin roof, moving from the open dock onto a covered porch filled with trading goods and a woman tending a cooking pot. The scene then transitions as the character leaves the shelter, descending wooden stairs to reach a muddy path. Finally, the camera tracks the character deeper into the swamp, passing beached boats toward distant structures barely visible through the haze.
